welcome.title: Welcome to Archivum
welcome.description: Your intelligent system to organize all your business documents.

upload.title: Upload and process documents
upload.description: Capture invoices, contracts and receipts. AI extracts the data automatically.

companies.title: Organize by company
companies.description: Create one company per client or department and group their documents.

team.title: Work as a team
team.description: Invite teammates with custom roles and per-company permissions.
team.b2: Granular access per company or folder

search.title: Find anything instantly
search.description: Smart search and filters by company, date, type or amount.

empresasCreateFirst.title: Create your first company
empresasCreateFirst.description: Group documents by client or department. The free plan includes 1 company.

equipoInviteFirst.title: Invite your team
equipoInviteFirst.description: Add admins, members or viewers. Each role has different permissions over companies and folders.

bibliotecaEmpty.title: Your documents will appear here
bibliotecaEmpty.description: When you upload invoices, contracts or receipts they will show up here. Tap the + button to upload the first one.

subirFirst.title: Upload your first document
subirFirst.description: Take a photo or pick a PDF from your gallery. AI will extract amounts, dates and data automatically.

ajustes.title: Settings
ajustes.signOutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
